public class WorkerManager33 {
    public static void menu(Integer choice, String name, String email, Date birthday, Integer workerid, String department){
        if(choice==1){
            //insert
            Worker3__c workerselect= new Worker3__c();
            workerselect.Name= name;
            workerselect.Email__c= email;
            workerselect.Birthdate__c= birthday;
            workerselect.Workerid__c= workerid;
            workerselect.Department__c= department;
            insert workerselect;
            System.debug('Inserted record');
        }
        else if(choice==2){
            List<Worker3__c> workerlist;
            workerlist= [SELECT Name, Email__c, Birthdate__c, Workerid__c, Department__c FROM Worker3__c];
            for(Worker3__c workie: workerlist){
                System.debug('Name '+'|'+ workie.Name + 'Employeeid: ' + '|' + workie.Workerid__c );
            }
            //view
        }
        else if(choice==3){
            //update
            Worker3__c worker_u= [SELECT Id, Name, Email__c, Birthdate__c, Workerid__c, Department__c FROM Worker3__c WHERE Workerid__c=: workerid];
            if(name!=null){
                worker_u.Name= name;
            }
            if(department!=null){
                worker_u.Department__c= department;
            }
            update worker_u;
            System.debug('updated record');
        }
        else if(choice==4){
            //delete
            Worker3__c worker2= [SELECT Id FROM Worker3__c WHERE Workerid__c= :workerid];
            delete worker2;
        }
        else{
            System.debug('Invalid choice.');
        }
    }
}

WorkerManager33.menu(1, 'MANORAMA', 'MANORAMA@GMAIL',Date.newInstance(1995,02,02), 5, 'CE');
WorkerManager33.menu(2, null, null ,null ,null , null);
WorkerManager33.menu(1,'MANGALAM', 'IMANGS@GMAIL', Date.newInstance(2005,01,16),6,  'CE');
WorkerManager33.menu(3, 'Manorama Mudgal', null ,null ,5 , null);
WorkerManager33.menu(2, null, null ,null ,null , null);
WorkerManager33.menu(4, null, null ,null ,6 , null);
WorkerManager33.menu(2, null, null ,null ,null , null);


public class BankAccountManager {
    public static void menu(
        Integer choice,
        Integer accountNumber,
        String holderName,
        String email,
        Date birthDate,
        String department,
        Decimal balance
    ) {
        // ─── 1. CREATE ───────────────────────────────────────────
        if (choice == 1) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c acc = new BankAccount__c();
                acc.AccountNumber__c = accountNumber;
                acc.Name             = holderName;
                acc.Email__c         = email;
                acc.BirthDate__c     = birthDate;
                acc.Department__c    = department;
                acc.Balance__c       = balance;
                insert acc;
                System.debug(' Account Created Successfully!');
                System.debug('Account Number: ' + accountNumber + ' | Name: ' + holderName);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        // ─── 2. VIEW ALL ─────────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 2) {
            List<BankAccount__c> accList = [
                SELECT AccountNumber__c, Name, Email__c,
                       BirthDate__c, Department__c, Balance__c
                FROM BankAccount__c
            ];
            if (accList.isEmpty()) {
                System.debug('No records found.');
            } else {
                System.debug('===== ALL BANK ACCOUNTS =====');
                for (BankAccount__c a : accList) {
                    System.debug(
                        'AccNo: '      + a.AccountNumber__c +
                        ' | Name: '    + a.Name +
                        ' | Email: '   + a.Email__c +
                        ' | DOB: '     + a.BirthDate__c +
                        ' | Dept: '    + a.Department__c +
                        ' | Balance: ' + a.Balance__c
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        // ─── 3. VIEW BY ACCOUNT NUMBER ───────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 3) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c a = [
                    SELECT AccountNumber__c, Name, Email__c,
                           BirthDate__c, Department__c, Balance__c
                    FROM BankAccount__c
                    WHERE AccountNumber__c = :accountNumber
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                System.debug('===== ACCOUNT DETAILS =====');
                System.debug('Account No  : ' + a.AccountNumber__c);
                System.debug('Name        : ' + a.Name);
                System.debug('Email       : ' + a.Email__c);
                System.debug('Birth Date  : ' + a.BirthDate__c);
                System.debug('Department  : ' + a.Department__c);
                System.debug('Balance     : ' + a.Balance__c);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Account not found: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        // ─── 4. UPDATE ───────────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 4) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c acc = [
                    SELECT Id, Name, Email__c, BirthDate__c,
                           Department__c, Balance__c
                    FROM BankAccount__c
                    WHERE AccountNumber__c = :accountNumber
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                if (holderName  != null) acc.Name          = holderName;
                if (email       != null) acc.Email__c       = email;
                if (birthDate   != null) acc.BirthDate__c   = birthDate;
                if (department  != null) acc.Department__c  = department;
                if (balance     != null) acc.Balance__c     = balance;
                update acc;
                System.debug(' Account Updated Successfully!');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        // ─── 5. DEPOSIT ──────────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 5) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c acc = [
                    SELECT Id, Balance__c
                    FROM BankAccount__c
                    WHERE AccountNumber__c = :accountNumber
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                acc.Balance__c += balance;   // balance param = deposit amount
                update acc;
                System.debug(' Deposited: ' + balance + ' | New Balance: ' + acc.Balance__c);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        // ─── 6. WITHDRAW ─────────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 6) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c acc = [
                    SELECT Id, Balance__c
                    FROM BankAccount__c
                    WHERE AccountNumber__c = :accountNumber
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                if (acc.Balance__c < balance) {
                    System.debug(' Insufficient Balance! Current Balance: ' + acc.Balance__c);
                } else {
                    acc.Balance__c -= balance;  // balance param = withdraw amount
                    update acc;
                    System.debug(' Withdrawn: ' + balance + ' | New Balance: ' + acc.Balance__c);
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        // ─── 7. DELETE ───────────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 7) {
            try {
                BankAccount__c acc = [
                    SELECT Id
                    FROM BankAccount__c
                    WHERE AccountNumber__c = :accountNumber
                    LIMIT 1
                ];
                delete acc;
                System.debug(' Account Deleted Successfully!');
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.debug(' Account not found: ' + e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        else {
            System.debug(' Invalid choice. Please select 1 to 7.');
        }
    }
}

BankAccountManager.menu(1, 1001, 'Rahul Sharma', 'rahul@gmail.com',
    Date.newInstance(1995, 6, 15), 'Loans', 50000);


public class EmailManager {

    // ── Menu ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    public static void menu(
        Integer choice,
        String toAddress,
        String subject,
        String body,
        String attachmentName,
        String attachmentContent
    ) {
        // ── 1. Send Simple Email ──────────────────────────────────
        if (choice == 1) {
            sendSimpleEmail(toAddress, subject, body);
        }

        // ── 2. Send Email with Attachment ─────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 2) {
            sendEmailWithAttachment(
                toAddress, subject, body,
                attachmentName, attachmentContent
            );
        }

        // ── 3. Send HTML Email ────────────────────────────────────
        else if (choice == 3) {
            sendHtmlEmail(toAddress, subject, body);
        }

        else {
            System.debug(' Invalid choice. Select 1, 2 or 3.');
        }
    }

    // ── Simple Plain Text Email ───────────────────────────────────
    private static void sendSimpleEmail(
        String toAddress,
        String subject,
        String body
    ) {
        try {
            Messaging.SingleEmailMessage mail = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
            mail.setToAddresses(new List<String>{ toAddress });
            mail.setSubject(subject);
            mail.setPlainTextBody(body);
            Messaging.sendEmail(new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>{ mail });
            System.debug(' Simple Email Sent to: ' + toAddress);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    // ── Email with Attachment ─────────────────────────────────────
    private static void sendEmailWithAttachment(
        String toAddress,
        String subject,
        String body,
        String attachmentName,
        String attachmentContent
    ) {
        try {
            Messaging.SingleEmailMessage mail = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
            mail.setToAddresses(new List<String>{ toAddress });
            mail.setSubject(subject);
            mail.setPlainTextBody(body);

            Messaging.EmailFileAttachment attachment
                = new Messaging.EmailFileAttachment();
            attachment.setFileName(attachmentName);
            attachment.setBody(Blob.valueOf(attachmentContent));
            attachment.setContentType('text/plain');

            mail.setFileAttachments(
                new List<Messaging.EmailFileAttachment>{ attachment }
            );
            Messaging.sendEmail(new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>{ mail });
            System.debug(' Email with Attachment Sent to: ' + toAddress);
            System.debug('Attachment : ' + attachmentName);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    // ── HTML Email ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private static void sendHtmlEmail(
        String toAddress,
        String subject,
        String htmlBody
    ) {
        try {
            Messaging.SingleEmailMessage mail = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();
            mail.setToAddresses(new List<String>{ toAddress });
            mail.setSubject(subject);

            // Set HTML body instead of plain text
            mail.setHtmlBody(htmlBody);

            Messaging.sendEmail(new List<Messaging.SingleEmailMessage>{ mail });
            System.debug(' HTML Email Sent to: ' + toAddress);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.debug(' Error: ' + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}

// ── 1. Simple Email ──
EmailManager.menu(
    1,
    'gargikalekar1@gmail.com',
    'Welcome to Bank',
    'Your account has been created successfully.',
    null,
    null
);

// ── 2. Email with Attachment ──
EmailManager.menu(
    2,
    'recipient@gmail.com',
    'Your Bank Statement',
    'Please find your account statement attached.',
    'Statement.txt',
    'Account No : 1001\nName : Rahul\nBalance : 50000\nDept : Loans'
);

// ── 3. HTML Email ──
EmailManager.menu(
    3,
    'recipient@gmail.com',
    'Bank Notification',
    '<h2>Hello Rahul</h2><p>Your balance is <b>₹50,000</b></p>',
    null,
    null
);
